title: Module 1
content:
Intel 8051: Architecture, Special Function Registers, Pin description,
Interrupts, Stack and stack pointer, Addressing modes, Port
organization and dual operations of 8051 ports, Instruction format,
Counter and Timer operation, Memory organization of 8051.

title: Module 2
content:
Instruction sets of 8051: Data transfer instructions, Arithmetic,
logical, compare and rotate instructions- Bit processing instructions-
Program flow control instructions. Assembly language programming
of 8051, Interfacing with 8051- stepper motor, keyboard& rolling
display, ADC & DAC interfacing.

title: Module 3
content:
PIC Microcontrollers :- Overview of PIC 16 Series, Architecture of
PIC16F877A, Pin description, Memory organization, Core and
